\tzpentry{ID5802}{Torsion Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5802 introduces Torsion Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{\partial g_{ij}}{\partial \tau} = -2R_{ij} + \frac{2}{3}Rg_{ij} + \lambda_g \mathcal{T}_{ij}^{\text{matter}} \end{equation}
